Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Fate]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — Fate is distinct from the future; what is destined to occur does not always occur.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 1''' — Purple formations in eyes can see Fate.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Executors could interfere in Fate because they were not bound to the Eledari Pact.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Fate has been accelerated to bring a specific day sooner than expected.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — The Mad King's presence warps Fate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — A path shone in Fate.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — Elder Whisper can sometimes catch glimpses of Fate in his dreams.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — Eithan identifies fate as a possibility for what he is sensing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 9''' — Eithan senses a disruption in Fate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — Makiel argued that saving the world would be a deviation from Fate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Mercy's friends only survived because of Fate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Eithan can see and arrange Fate.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 1''' — Fate consists of branches that can dissolve.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Fate's flows bend according to Ozriel's actions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — Fate is a concept that governs the destiny and branches of worlds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 20''' — Daruman can twist Fate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Intentions influence Fate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 24''' — Suriel can scan Fate to read events.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Suriel's runic eyes can see the Fate being woven.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Makiel saw Fate split and twist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — The Penance arrow thundered through space and Fate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — The oracle codex checked Fate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — The oracle codex shows the real flow of Fate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — Malice gazed into the shadows of Fate.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — Fate is something that can be touched through the Way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Fate provides projections of future events.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Dross can glimpse Fate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Reading Fate can lead to being wrong.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Fate has yet to stabilize.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — OTEP has no greater access to Fate than any other Presence.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
